---
description: "A HTML-based interactive component demonstrating how neural networks work."
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: false
    menu: false
    theme: [default, dark.scss]
date: "2026-06-12"
categories: ["AI", "Neural Networks", "Middle School", "High School"]
image: "./images/neural_network.png"

---

## Will I Do Well on My Test?

```{=html}
<iframe src="./component/nn.html" allowtransparency="true" width="100%" height="600px" style="border:none; background:transparent;"></iframe>
```
